goal: 登记 Claude adapter C4 session

summary.title: Launch Claude C4 experimental-slice session
summary.what: Registered the C4 experimental-slice planning worker session after C3 integration. The registry now records the actual C4 thread id and worktree, and workflow-state marks C4 active.
summary.why: The orchestrator needs the real worker location in the canonical control plane so the C4 handoff can be waited on, copied, reviewed, and sealed without relying on a pending worktree id.
summary.user_goal: 登记 Claude adapter C4 session

decisions.chose: Launch C4 only after C1, C2, and C3 were integrated.
decisions.rationale: C4 depends on current Claude evidence, the private hybrid ingestion route, and the filtering/linearization policy.

decisions.chose: Record the actual C4 thread id and worker worktree immediately after resolution.
decisions.rationale: This keeps the orchestration state durable and avoids stale pending ids.

decisions.chose: Keep C4 as a planning-only worker.
decisions.rationale: The user asked for orchestration and next-session planning, not premature adapter implementation.

review_notes: Actual commit files are session-registry.md and workflow-state.md only.
Mainline prepare shows the full branch diff from origin/main because this is a stacked workflow branch.
Validation: git diff --check and git diff --cached --check passed before commit.
No implementation, public-source promotion, release, global install, push, PR, merge, or production action was performed.

architectural_claims: C4 is the planning gate before any private Claude adapter implementation slice can begin.
